name: tumbler
title: tumbler
description:
D-Bus thumbnailing service
Tumbler is a D-Bus service for applications to request thumbnails for various
URI schemes and MIME types. It is an implementation of the thumbnail management
D-Bus specification described on http://live.gnome.org/ThumbnailerSpec.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use tumbler because D-Bus thumbnailing service.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use tumbler as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair tumbler with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `tumbler --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
